rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: SocGholish NLTest Domain Trust Enumeration (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: SocGholish NLTest Domain Trust Enumeration (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: cdd824c2-ebda-404e-ad62-b2acf251976a
status: experimental
description: Detects domain trust enumeration with nltest.exe, a procedure associated
  with SocGholish. Part of the RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/socgholish/#threat-socgholish
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.discovery
- attack.t1482
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \nltest.exe
    CommandLine|contains|windash:
    - /domain_trusts
    - /all_trusts
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
